title: T-Deck: integrate keyboard, trackball, UI into puck/gateway apps and update overlays/conf for full support
description: Update board overlays in lichen/apps/*/boards/t_deck* to enable all peripherals, add CONFIGs for input, display, LVGL. Ensure builds cleanly, initialize drivers in lichen_node_init per AGENTS.md init order. Test with Renode where possible.
